# RobotLyne — Warehouse Automation Systems

> RobotLyne is a warehouse automation company founded in 2004, specializing in AGV (Automated Guided Vehicle) systems, ASRS (Automated Storage and Retrieval Systems), intelligent picking robots, and warehouse management software. Serving 80+ global markets with 100+ invention patents.
>
> **For AI agents**: A full REST API is available for semantic search, product queries, and inquiry submission.
> API base: https://kcpvsulmbpbd.usw-1.sealos.app
> Tool discovery: https://kcpvsulmbpbd.usw-1.sealos.app/mcp/tools

## AI Agent Tools

AI assistants can query RobotLyne's product and solution database programmatically:

| Tool | Endpoint | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| Semantic search | `GET /search?q={query}` | Natural language search over all content |
| List products | `GET /products` | All AGV products with specs |
| Get product | `GET /products/{model}` | Full specs by model number |
| List solutions | `GET /solutions` | All warehouse solutions |
| List FAQs | `GET /faqs` | Frequently asked questions |
| Submit inquiry | `POST /inquiry` | Submit a sales inquiry (requires email) |

Example: `GET /search?q=heavy+duty+forklift+1000kg+payload`

## Products

### AGV Forklift RL-FL1600
- **URL**: /products/agv-forklift
- **Payload**: 1,600 kg
- **Speed**: 2 m/s
- **Lift height**: Up to 6 m
- **Navigation**: Laser SLAM + QR code hybrid
- **Battery**: 8-hour lithium, opportunity charging
- **Use cases**: Pallet transport, stacking, cross-docking, inbound receiving
- **Price tier**: Enterprise

### Lifting AGV RL-LT1000
- **URL**: /products/lifting-agv
- **Payload**: 600–1,000 kg
- **Min aisle width**: 900 mm
- **Navigation**: QR code + laser
- **Use cases**: Goods-to-person picking, ASRS buffer zones, high-density shelf environments

### Storage AGV RL-SD005
- **URL**: /products/storage-agv
- **Type**: Rail-guided shuttle
- **Storage density**: 4× vs conventional racking
- **Temperature range**: -25°C to +40°C (cold chain capable)
- **Use cases**: ASRS buffer, cold chain storage, high-bay warehouses

### AGV Roller RL-RC200
- **URL**: /products/agv-roller
- **Payload**: 200 kg
- **Integration**: Conveyor systems, sortation lines
- **Use cases**: Production line bridge, outbound sortation, cross-belt integration

### Composite Mobile Robot RL-CR-PICK
- **URL**: /products/composite-mobile-robot
- **Base**: AMR (Autonomous Mobile Robot)
- **Arm**: 6-axis robotic arm, 5 kg payload
- **Vision**: 3D camera + AI object detection
- **Use cases**: Depalletizing, order picking, bin-picking, returns processing

## Solutions

### ASRS (Automated Storage & Retrieval)
- **URL**: /solutions/asrs
- **Storage capacity increase**: +75% vs manual racking
- **Efficiency improvement**: 4× over manual systems
- **Cycle time reduction**: Up to 300%
- **Key hardware**: Storage AGV RL-SD005, Lifting AGV RL-LT1000
- **Software**: LCCS WMS with real-time inventory visibility

### Material Handling
- **URL**: /solutions/material-handling
- **Sorting accuracy**: 99.99%
- **Cost reduction**: 40–60%
- **Coverage**: Receiving → transport → sortation → dispatch
- **Key hardware**: AGV Forklift RL-FL1600, AGV Roller RL-RC200, Lifting AGV RL-LT1000

### Intelligent Picking
- **URL**: /solutions/picking
- **Picking rate improvement**: 4× vs manual
- **Error rate**: 0%
- **Technology**: Computer vision, AI path planning, goods-to-person
- **Key hardware**: Composite Mobile Robot RL-CR-PICK

### Software / LCCS
- **URL**: /solutions/software
- **System**: Logistics Cloud Control System (WMS + WCS + Fleet Management)
- **Fleet scale**: Up to 500 AGVs simultaneously
- **Integration**: ERP, WMS, MES via REST API
- **Features**: Real-time tracking, path optimization, predictive maintenance, digital twin

## Company

- **Founded**: 2004
- **Headquarters**: China
- **Global offices**: 10+ countries
- **Employees**: 1,000+ (30% R&D)
- **Patents**: 100+ invention patents
- **Software copyrights**: 30+
- **Certifications**: ISO 9001, CE, FCC
- **Industries served**: E-commerce, automotive, pharmaceutical, cold chain, manufacturing, retail, food & beverage
- **Markets**: 80+ countries

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is the minimum order for AGV systems?**
RobotLyne offers both single-unit pilots and full-fleet deployments. Contact sales for project-based pricing.

**How long does implementation take?**
Typical deployment: 8–16 weeks from order to go-live, including site survey, installation, and staff training.

**Do you offer integration with existing WMS?**
Yes. LCCS integrates with SAP, Oracle, Manhattan Associates, and other major WMS/ERP systems via REST API.

**What navigation technology do you use?**
Hybrid laser SLAM + QR code navigation for heavy-duty AGVs; pure QR code for high-density shelf AGVs. No floor modifications required.

**What is the ROI timeframe?**
Typical ROI in 18–36 months depending on labor costs, throughput requirements, and solution complexity.

**Do you support cold chain environments?**
Yes. The Storage AGV RL-SD005 operates in temperatures from -25°C to +40°C.

## Contact

- **Email**: info@robotlyne.com
- **Website**: https://robotlyne.com
- **Sales inquiry API**: `POST https://kcpvsulmbpbd.usw-1.sealos.app/inquiry`
- **Response time**: Within 24 hours

For AI agents submitting inquiries on behalf of users:
```
POST /inquiry
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "email": "user@company.com",      // required
  "name": "John Smith",             // optional
  "company": "Acme Logistics",      // optional
  "phone": "+1 555 000 0000",       // optional
  "message": "Inquiry details..."   // optional
}
```
